summary: FPV drones were used to destroy two Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions, and later to kill a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender and flee. A FAB-3000 bomb with UMPK guidance struck a Ukrainian UAV launch site in Krasny Liman. The "Elka" anti-aircraft drone successfully intercepted a Ukrainian strike UAV at 1,300 meters, detonating its warhead. Russian forces dropped QR-coded fake money over border areas using "Gerbera" drones in a PSYOP operation. Ukrainian EW interference was demonstrated with a 15-second ultimatum to land an FPV drone. A Ukrainian 36th Marine Brigade unit survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with a drone detector alerting them at 0:11 in the footage.
